contentBrief.headline: Title 36, §4923: Excise tax imposed
contentBrief.angle: Title 36, §4923: Excise tax imposed. This update affects Maine cannabis businesses and may require updates to existing guide content.
keyPoints: Financial impact on Maine cannabis businesses

agentPrompt: Write a content update about "Title 36, §4923: Excise tax imposed".
